requirements.summary: Public guest site lists open volunteer shifts without login
requirements.source_quote: find open shifts on a public landing page without logging in

requirements.summary: Two-click shift signup auto-creates Person Account for new volunteers
requirements.source_quote: signs up for a shift in two clicks, gets a confirmation, and the system auto-creates a Person Account if they're new

requirements.summary: Coordinator dashboard flags first-time volunteers for personal welcome
requirements.source_quote: with a flag on anyone who hasn't volunteered before. She wants to send those people a personal welcome

requirements.summary: Programs Director dashboard: shifts filled, new volunteers, retention rate
requirements.source_quote: shifts filled this week, new volunteers this week, retention rate
